description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine strt_2, and is implemented by a call to strt_2. Use this API to initialize a PSSE dynamic simulation for state-space simulations (i.e., in preparation for activity RUN) and to specify the channel output file into which the output channel values are to be recorded during the dynamic simulation. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = strt(option, outfile)

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Network solution convergence monitor option. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Name of the channel output file (blank to bypass recording of the output channel values in a channel output file). (input; blank by default).

option.description: print the convergence monitor only if it is enabled via the CM interrupt control code.

error_codes.description: Prior initialization modified the loads–pick up original converted case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
